objective: Build packages/hldpro-sim/ — a governance-owned Python package implementing the OASIS multi-agent simulation pattern. Includes CodexCliProvider (proven via contract test), BaseAggregator[T], shared persona registry (5 persona JSON files), and a Stampede consumer proof fixture. First consumer: Stampede Phase 0 Slice 6.
scope_boundary: packages/hldpro-sim/ Python package with pyproject.toml, hldprosim/ module, tests/, and personas/
hldprosim/providers.py: CodexCliProvider (subprocess codex exec --ephemeral) + AnthropicApiProvider (NotImplementedError stub)
hldprosim/personas.py: PersonaLoader with local-first + shared fallback resolution
hldprosim/engine.py: SimulationEngine wiring provider + loader + prompt_template + outcome_schema
5 persona JSON files: trader-momentum, trader-growth, trader-value, hvac-homeowner, asc-medical-director
tests/ covering all modules with unittest.mock (no live codex exec in tests)
out_of_scope: AnthropicApiProvider live implementation (deferred until API keys provisioned)
Deployer wiring to governance-tooling package (follow-on issue)
Live codex exec integration tests (contract proven 2026-04-20; unit mocks sufficient)
Stampede Phase 0 Slice 6 actual implementation (this is the library only)
research_summary: CodexCliProvider contract proven on 2026-04-20: codex exec --ephemeral --skip-git-repo-check --sandbox read-only --output-schema <schema.json> -o <output.json> '<prompt>'. Prompt must be positional arg (stdin hangs). Schema must include additionalProperties:false. ~30s wall clock, ~11k tokens per call. Codex authored all package files in one pass on branch issue-407-hldpro-sim-20260420. 6 of 13 tests fail due to plan schema mismatch (Write hook blocked persona files) and minor test bugs from code generation.
research_artifacts: packages/hldpro-sim/hldprosim/ — all module files authored by Codex 2026-04-20
packages/hldpro-sim/tests/ — test suite authored by Codex 2026-04-20
Issue #407: hldpro-sim OASIS simulation engine package
Issue #410: plan file schema fix (this session)

sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Package scaffold, providers, persona loader
sprints.goal: pyproject.toml, hldprosim module with providers.py + personas.py, test_providers.py passing.
tasks: pyproject.toml with setuptools>=68 build backend, pydantic>=2.0 dep
acceptance_criteria: CodexCliProvider builds subprocess args with prompt as positional arg
PersonaLoader local-first + shared fallback + FileNotFoundError all tested

sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Engine, runner, aggregator, artifacts
sprints.goal: SimulationEngine + Runner + BaseAggregator + ArtifactWriter all tested with mocks.
acceptance_criteria: SimulationEngine.run passes correct system/user to provider
Runner.run_n returns n outcomes; ThreadPoolExecutor path tested

sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Persona registry + Stampede consumer proof
sprints.goal: 5 persona JSON files + e2e fixture test proving Stampede integration pattern.
tasks: tests/test_stampede_consumer_proof.py: MockProvider e2e through full stack
acceptance_criteria: All 5 persona files loadable via PersonaLoader
test_stampede_e2e passes: MockProvider -> Engine -> Runner(n=3) -> Aggregator -> ArtifactWriter

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm package stays library-only; no deployer wiring, no live API calls in tests.
specialist_reviews.summary: Scope tightly bounded to packages/hldpro-sim/. No governance surface files modified. AnthropicApiProvider is stub only. All tests use mocks.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify CodexCliProvider subprocess invocation matches proven contract exactly.
specialist_reviews.summary: Proven pattern on 2026-04-20: positional prompt arg, --ephemeral, additionalProperties:false enforced. Tests mock subprocess.run and verify arg list.

alternate_model_review.summary: Tier 2 library package. Not a standards change, not a governance surface modification. SoM charter does not require alternate-model review for implementation-only packages.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: All 3 sprints implemented by Codex in worktree issue-407-hldpro-sim-20260420. Dispatcher applies mechanical test fixes and persona files, then pushes and opens PR.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run pytest packages/hldpro-sim/tests/ -v; confirm 13/13 pass; commit; push; open PR against main.

material_deviation_rules: If any test touches live codex exec (not mocked), HALT — tests must be hermetic.
If packages/hldpro-sim/ grows to include governance surface files, open a new issue before proceeding.
If AnthropicApiProvider is implemented (not just stub), that requires a separate issue with API key plan.
If persona files do not load via PersonaLoader.load(), fix the file — do not change the loader contract.
